creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Oops, gnats doesn't like quoted printable. Here is a readable copy in
html format:

  ftp://ftp.lissyara.su/users/Guest/pr/146335

You can as well use a mail reader with raw PR. Don't forget gnats
stripped these headers:

  Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
  Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
